overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game showing a character exploring dark abandoned subway tunnels with a flashlight. The character navigates through graffiti-covered corridors and debris-filled sections before encountering a shadowy figure in a collapsed tunnel section.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned subway tunnel with graffiti-covered concrete walls

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along railway tracks, shining flashlight on walls covered in colorful graffiti and tags

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running through the center of the tunnel floor
concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
industrial steel beams supporting the tunnel ceiling
red glowing emergency lights mounted on the tunnel walls
windows with metal wire mesh covering, showing darkness outside

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow abandoned subway tunnel, illuminating graffiti-covered walls with a flashlight. Red emergency lights cast an eerie glow on the concrete walls as the character follows the railway tracks deeper into the underground passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled tunnel section with sandbag barricades and rubble

events.description: transitioning from red-lit section to area with more debris and rubble on the ground

agents.ego_description: navigating through debris and sandbags along the tracks, passing under metal support structures

entered.detail: piles of broken concrete and rubble scattered across the railway tracks
stacks of white sandbags piled along the left wall
concrete pillars with black and white hazard stripes
white painted text reading 'FIND ALICE' on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a section with more debris and rubble, passing sandbag barricades and striped support pillars. The lighting becomes darker and more mixed as the character approaches a more deteriorated section of the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: collapsed tunnel section with police tape and supernatural mist

events.description: text 'COLLAPSED TUNNEL' appears on screen, entering darker restricted area with police tape
shadowy humanoid figure materializes in the mist ahead on the tracks

agents.ego_description: approaching a shadowy figure with weapon drawn and flashlight aimed, moving cautiously through the mist

notable_agents.action: shadowy humanoid figure standing in the mist, facing the player character

entered.detail: yellow police line tape strung across metal posts blocking the path
metal safety railings along the right side of the tracks
rough stone walls replacing the concrete tunnel walls
portable yellow construction lights on stands illuminating the area
dark red bloodstains on the ground near the tracks

segments.scene_description: Entering the collapsed tunnel section marked by police tape, the environment becomes darker and filled with mist. The character encounters a shadowy humanoid figure standing in the path, creating a tense confrontation in the bloodstained area.

scene_state.functional_zone: post-encounter collapsed tunnel with exposed rock walls

events.description: shadow figure dissipates or is defeated after confrontation
shining flashlight on rock wall to examine surface texture and details

agents.ego_description: examining the environment after the encounter, shining flashlight on rock walls and bloodstains on the ground

entered.detail: rough exposed rock surface of the tunnel wall illuminated by flashlight

segments.scene_description: After the shadow figure dissipates, the character continues through the collapsed section, examining the rough rock walls and bloodstains with the flashlight. The tunnel remains dark and atmospheric with construction lights providing minimal illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a decaying subway system that transforms from a structured corridor into a chaotic, mist-shrouded ruin. It begins with the camera moving along railway tracks, where a flashlight illuminates graffiti-covered walls under the eerie glow of red emergency lights. As the character advances, the environment shifts toward a more deteriorated state, passing through sandbag barricades and striped support pillars amidst increasing piles of rubble. The scene then opens into a collapsed section marked by police tape and thick mist, where the camera confronts a shadowy humanoid figure standing in a bloodstained area. Finally, after the figure dissipates, the camera pushes further into the darkness to examine rough rock walls and lingering bloodstains under the dim flicker of distant construction lights.
